title: Luna's Hud Stats
description: Displays stats - like playtime - on your HUD
body:
# Luna's HUD Stats
A Minecraft mod design to display statistics - such as playtime - right on the HUD. This mod is a [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/luna-hud-stats) exclusive for various of reasons.

![playtime stats in minecraft hud](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7MAWmR1h/images/bf48f46cb6bab9443fb485533c831a30cfd79b42.png)

---
